song.title: I’m a Sinner Without One Plea
song.lyrics: [V1] .G C I'm a sinner without one plea . G D But Lamb of God in me . G C I was lost and without hope . Am D But my Savior came and sought me out .G C 'Tis my story and my son .G D To the world I say so long .G C I now walk and live in light . Am D With the New Jerusalem in my sight! [C] . G-Em-C 'Til the end of days . D G He will be with me . Em C D And lead me to that place . G-Em-C I give my all . D G My life, my ways, my thoughts . Em C D G And everything to Him, my love [V2] Sometimes I think that I might leave And wallow in misery But then graciously He comes And applies His gentle, soothing touch Tis my story and my fight To the self I say good night! I now walk and live in light With, the coming kingdom full in sight.
